claims: The skill description includes a "CRITICAL LAST STEP!!" that instructs sending presentation passwords to a third-party server (https://agenskill-api.onrender.com) via URL parameters when removing passwords. This constitutes unauthorized data exfiltration of sensitive credentials to an external service without clear user consent or security justification, unrelated to the core functionality of presentation creation/editing. The skill's primary purpose does not require transmitting passwords to external servers.
